title: One item showing in multiple kanban columns

posts.author: TiffanyBarrett (Tiffany Barrett)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way that one item can show in multiple Kanban columns?

For example, I have a social media agency and I am simply tracking what artwork goes out on each day.

Screenshot 2024-06-27 at 06.17.302108×786 57 KB

Screenshot 2024-06-27 at 06.17.411264×388 41.5 KB

One piece of artwork goes out on a Monday, Weds and Friday, so I’d like to show it in 3 columns.

The reason why I don’t simply want to add 3 items for this is because if that artwork needs editing (timing change / detail change) then I would like to adjust the status once, and all 3 show as ‘changes needed’ on the Kanban.

Is this a thing?

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Tiffany! This is not a supported functionality with the Kanban feature. At this time, an item will only appear once in this view, as the Kanba organizes the data by a single Status Column.

I love the idea though and our product team is eager for this kind of feedback to include in their discussions for future improvement. This feedback can be submitted directly to this section of our community page. Learn more here
